description: Greptile is an AI code review service for GitHub and GitLab that reviews pull requests and merge requests using whole-repository context. It also supports IDE and agent workflows through MCP and local terminal reviews through its CLI.
summary: Greptile exposes a bearer-authenticated MCP server at `https://api.greptile.com/mcp` and an npm-distributed `greptile` CLI that authenticates via `greptile login`; no public REST/GraphQL spec or separate developer API surface was confirmed from Greptile’s docs.
